use_cases: Select colors in design tools or creative software
Choose product colors in e-commerce product configuration
Pick accent colors for theme customization interfaces
Select brand colors in marketing or branding tools
Input colors in any form requiring visual color selection
ai_summary: A color picker input component featuring a saturation/brightness picker area with draggable thumb, hex input field, and color swatch trigger. Built on Ark UI with dark mode support, Portal positioning for overlay behavior, and focus/keyboard accessibility. Designed with minimalist flat styling suitable for design tools, e-commerce color selection, or theme customization interfaces.
